task.role: You are a Senior Rust Engineer with expertise in systems programming and APIs. Implement Task 13 with production-quality code.

context.overview: Integrate Kafka producer to publish notification events for downstream processing
context.background: This task is part of a larger project. Key resources: - PRD: .tasks/docs/prd.txt (full requirements and architecture) - Related tasks: 4, 12 - Infrastructure config: Check ConfigMaps for connection strings

requirements.description:
1. Add rdkafka crate for Kafka integration
2. Configure Kafka producer with proper serialization
3. Publish events to notifications.created topic
4. Handle Kafka connection failures gracefully
5. Add producer metrics

constraints.constraint: Match existing codebase patterns and conventions
Create PR with atomic, well-described commits
Include unit tests for new functionality
PR title format: feat(task-13): Kafka Event Publishing (Rex - Rust/Axum)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: All requirements from task description implemented
Code follows project conventions and style guide
Notification submissions trigger Kafka events, events visible in Kafka topic, service handles Kafka downtime gracefully

deliverables.deliverable: Unit tests covering new code paths
